## Relationships (Application-Layer FKs)

**CONFIG_MESTEX** -> ORDER_HEADER (SALES_ORDER -> ORDER_NO); ORDER_LINES (SO_LINE -> RECORD_NO)

**CONFIG_MFG** -> BOM_MSTR (BOM -> PARENT); CONFIG_OPTIONS (BASE_ID->BASE_ID, ID_NUM->ID_NUM); OP_CODES (OP_CODE -> OPERATION); ROUTER_HEADER (FLAT_ROUTER->ROUTER, ROUTER->ROUTER); ROUTER_LINE (ROUTER_SEQUENCE -> LINE_ROUTER); WORKCENTERS (WORKCENTER -> MACHINE)

**CONFIG_OPTIONS** -> INVENTORY_MSTR (BASE_PART->PART, IDENTIFIER->PART); PL_MASTER (PRODUCT_LINE -> PROD_LINE)

**CONFIG_ORD_INSERT** -> BOM_MSTR (BOM -> PARENT); OP_CODES (LMO->LMO, OPCODE->OPERATION); ORDER_CONFIG (BASEID->BASE_ID, CFG_ID->SEQUENCE, ID->ID_NUM, SEQ->SEQUENCE); ORDER_HEADER (ORDER_NO -> ORDER_NO); ORDER_LINES (ORDER_LINE -> RECORD_NO); ROUTER_HEADER (FLAT_RTR->ROUTER, RTR->ROUTER); ROUTER_LINE (SEQUENCE -> LINE_ROUTER); WORKCENTERS (WORKCENTER -> MACHINE)

**CONFIG_QTE_INSERT** -> CONFIG_OPTIONS (BASEID->BASE_ID, ID->ID_NUM); MFGCFG_INQT_NOTES (SEQ -> SEQ); OP_CODES (LMO->LMO, OPCODE->OPERATION); QUOTE_CONFIG (CFG_ID -> SEQUENCE); QUOTE_HEADER (QUOTE_NO -> QUOTE_NO); QUOTE_LINES (QUOTE_LINE -> RECORD_NO); ROUTER_HEADER (FLAT_RTR->ROUTER, RTR->ROUTER); ROUTER_LINE (SEQUENCE -> LINE_ROUTER); WORKCENTERS (WORKCENTER -> MACHINE)

**CONFIG_QUOTE** -> QUOTE_HEADER (ORDER_NO -> QUOTE_NO); QUOTE_LINES (ORDER_LINE -> RECORD_NO); UM_CODES (UM -> CODE)

**CONFIG_RULES** -> CONFIG_OPTIONS (BASE_ID->BASE_ID, ID_NUM->ID_NUM, RELATED_ID->ID_NUM); INVENTORY_MSTR (IDENTIFIER->PART, RELATED_IDENTIFIER->PART)
